title: The Wild, Wild West
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is dragged to the Wild West, where he must tame a fierce bull to free a thirsty town from a water-stealing outlaw! 🤠

q.en: What is Geronimo Stilton's job in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿在新鼠城的工作是什么？

options.en: A train conductor according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一名列车员（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo says he is the editor of The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular paper in New Mouse City.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说自己是新鼠城最受欢迎的报纸《啮齿动物公报》的主编。

q.en: Who traveled with Geronimo into the Wild West?
q.zh: 谁是和杰罗尼摩一起前往狂野西部的同伴？

options.en: His sister Thea, cousin Trap, and nephew Benjamin
options.zh: 他的妹妹蒂奥、表哥特拉普和侄子本杰明

options.en: His friend Hercule Poirat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他的朋友赫拉克·波瓦（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo says his sister Thea, cousin Trap, and little nephew Benjamin crossed the scorching desert with him.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说他的妹妹蒂奥、表哥特拉普和小侄子本杰明和他一起穿过了酷热的沙漠。

q.en: In which desert did the Stilton family first find themselves?
q.zh: 斯蒂顿一家最初发现自己身处哪片沙漠？

options.en: The Sahara Desert according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 撒哈拉沙漠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo complains that he was in the Arizona desert, hot, dry, and dying of thirst.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩抱怨说自己身处亚利桑那沙漠，又热又干，渴得要命。

q.en: How did the mice pay Blunt Rat Bob for their cowboy supplies?
q.zh: 老鼠们是如何付钱给杂货店老板钝鼠鲍勃买牛仔装备的？

options.en: With paper money from New Mouse City according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用新鼠城的纸币（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: With gold and Benjamin's electronic game
options.zh: 用黄金和本杰明的电子游戏机

options.en: With a big wheel of cheese

explain.en: Bob wanted gold, not bills; Geronimo, Thea and Trap gave gold items, and Benjamin traded his Cheese Blaster game to seal the deal.
explain.zh: 鲍勃只收黄金不收纸币；杰罗尼摩、蒂奥和特拉普拿出了金子，本杰明则用自己的奶酪爆破游戏机换来了装备。

q.en: What drink did Geronimo order in the saloon that made everyone laugh?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在酒馆里点了什么饮料，惹得大家都哈哈大笑？

explain.en: Geronimo asked the bartender for a hot cup of Squeakytime Tea, and the whole saloon roared with laughter.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩向酒保要了一杯热乎乎的吱吱茶，整个酒馆的老鼠都放声大笑。

q.en: Why did the tough rat Mick Muscle Mouse want to fight Geronimo?
q.zh: 强壮的米克·肌肉鼠为什么要和杰罗尼摩打架？

options.zh: 杰罗尼摩弄坏了他吉他的

options.en: Geronimo accidentally stepped on his paw
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩不小心踩到了他的爪子

options.en: Geronimo won his money at cards according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩在牌桌上赢了他的钱（按书中另一种说法）
杰罗尼摩偷了他的帽子

explain.en: Geronimo hopped around screaming 'OUCH' and accidentally stepped on Mick's paw, so Mick challenged him to a fight.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩痛得乱跳、大喊“哎哟”，不小心踩到了米克的爪子，于是米克向他发出了决斗挑战。

q.en: Who accidentally saved Geronimo from the fight with Mick?
q.zh: 是谁阴差阳错地把杰罗尼摩从与米克的打斗中救了出来？

options.en: The town sheriff according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 镇上的警长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When pretty Miss Dolly arrived, Mick turned lovesick, let go of Geronimo's ear, and forgot all about the fight.
explain.zh: 当漂亮的多莉小姐出现时，米克害了相思病，松开杰罗尼摩的耳朵，把决斗的事忘得一干二净。

q.en: How did the evil Wicked Whiskers control Cactus City?
q.zh: 邪恶的恶胡须是用什么手段控制仙人掌城的？

options.en: He built a dam to stop the river water
He locked the sheriff in jail according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他把警长关进了监狱（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He stole all the town's gold

explain.en: Wicked Whiskers built a dam on the Twisting Tail River so water no longer reached Cactus City, and made the town pay him in gold for water.
explain.zh: 恶胡须在扭尾河上修了一座水坝，让河水再也流不到仙人掌城，还逼镇上的老鼠用黄金向他买水。

q.en: What kind of animal was Bessie, the beast Geronimo had to tame?
q.zh: 贝西是杰罗尼摩必须驯服的什么动物？

options.en: A rattlesnake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一条响尾蛇（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Trap tells Geronimo that Bessie is a bull — an immense black beast with long horns and terrifying red eyes.
explain.zh: 特拉普告诉杰罗尼摩，贝西是一头公牛——一头长着长角和可怕红眼睛的黑色巨兽。

q.en: What was really making the bull Bessie so angry?
q.zh: 到底是什么让公牛贝西如此愤怒？

options.en: He was starving hungry according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他饿坏了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A cactus thorn was stuck in his ear
options.zh: 一根仙人掌刺扎进了他的耳朵

explain.en: Benjamin waved and pointed at his own ear; Geronimo found a huge cactus thorn in Bessie's ear, pulled it out, and the bull calmed down.
explain.zh: 本杰明又挥爪子又指自己的耳朵；杰罗尼摩发现贝西耳朵上扎着一根大仙人掌刺，拔掉后公牛就安静了下来。
